name: screencast-cut
description: Edit a terminal recording (.cast) or screen capture (.mp4) into a finished tutorial video. Detects idle gaps and speed-ramps or cuts them — for both terminal casts and screen recordings — surfaces fumble regions (backspace runs and Ctrl-U / Ctrl-W kills) as cut candidates, generates narration audio from a text script via ElevenLabs (when you pass Script: instead of Audio:), transcribes audio with Whisper for word-level captions, and emits a Remotion project that the remotion-video plugin can render. Reuses the active brand profile (including its theme-approved voice roster) so output matches the rest of your videos.
